MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SHIRLEY CHOW-WANG AND WILLIAM WANG'S Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award.
APPEARANCES: Deirdre O'Reilly Marblestone, Esq., 510-582-1080 of Furtado, Jaspovice & Simons for Petitioner and Moving Party; Kennedy P. Richardson, Esq., 510-451-6770 for Respondent and Opposing Party.
RULING: Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling. DENY - VACATING ARBITRATION AWARD - UNTIMELY. Prevailing party to prepare order. (302/REQ/PB). BELDON YEE, CRS # 2647
